workflow: Workflow B — Direct keyword → page → generate (Template HR-D cost pages)
instructions: Run steps 1→5 for each page in order (Turkey first, then Spain, Greece).
After step 1, copy the returned keyword id into step 2.
After step 2, copy the returned page id into steps 3–5.
Steps 3, 4, 5 have no JSON body — only path/query params.
Put the full content brief in the keyword notes field.

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template HR-D (~1,800 words). Turkey is the world's leading hair transplant destination. REQUIRED H2s: (1) Hair Transplant Cost in Turkey: Direct Answer, (2) Base Procedure Costs by Graft Count (2,000/3,000/4,000+), (3) FUE vs DHI Price Differences, (4) Add-On Costs: PRP, Accommodation Packages, Medication, (5) Travel and Logistics Costs, (6) Total All-In Cost Scenarios, (7) Hidden Costs Patients Reported, (8) How Turkey Compares With UK/USA, (9) What Affects Hair Transplant Price?, (10) FAQ. Cost range €1,500–€3,500 for 2,000–4,000 grafts. Link to /guides/turkey-hair-restoration-guide, /guides/turkey/istanbul-hair-restoration-guide, /treatments/hair-restoration. YMYL: cite ISHRS, patient interview data.

body.title: Hair Transplant Cost in Turkey 2026: What Patients Actually Paid
body.metaTitle: Hair Transplant Cost Turkey 2026 — Real Patient Data | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Hair transplant in Turkey costs €1,500–€3,500 for 2,000–4,000 grafts based on verified patient interviews. See FUE/DHI pricing, hidden fees, and all-in costs.

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template HR-D (~1,800 words). Spain offers EU-regulated hair transplant clinics in Barcelona and Madrid. REQUIRED H2s: same as Turkey cost page adapted for Spain. Cost range €3,500–€7,000 for 2,000–4,000 grafts. Emphasize EU medical standards, Spanish-language support, shorter flights from UK. Link to Spain country and city guides.

body.title: Hair Transplant Cost in Spain 2026: What Patients Actually Paid
body.metaTitle: Hair Transplant Cost Spain 2026 — Real Patient Data | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Hair transplant in Spain costs €3,500–€7,000 for 2,000–4,000 grafts. EU-regulated clinics in Barcelona and Madrid with verified patient pricing data.

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template HR-D (~1,800 words). Greece offers mid-range pricing with Athens as the primary hub. REQUIRED H2s: same cost page structure. Cost range €2,500–€5,500 for 2,000–4,000 grafts. Link to Greece country and Athens city guides.

body.title: Hair Transplant Cost in Greece 2026: What Patients Actually Paid
body.metaTitle: Hair Transplant Cost Greece 2026 — Real Patient Data | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Hair transplant in Greece costs €2,500–€5,500 for 2,000–4,000 grafts. Athens clinics with verified FUE/DHI pricing and patient interview data.
